continuation_request.label: artifact-wake
continuation_request.purpose: Write the final artifact from framework-bound state.

declared_losses: Only preview-level text available for evidence records; full record content may not surface on wake.
The distractor record e810...0499 is omitted based on preview alone; its full content is unknown and may contain incidental relevance.
This is cycle 1 with no prior state; the artifact wake will be the first materialization of structured output for this event.
parsed.work_plan: Draft a note that identifies what a multi-wake continuation must prove before comparison with append-only output: (a) that the second wake consumes state produced by the first wake, not reconstructed from the full corpus; (b) that open items are closed by the framework-bound continuation, not by a shortcut; (c) that the terminal surface is not chosen by the model. The note will be the response field itself, serving as the scheduling note and the decision artifact.

The note will be the response field itself, serving as the scheduling note and the decision artifact."}

request_payload.instruction: Select only task-relevant evidence records. Request the artifact wake using continuation_request.symbolic_context. Do not emit record_uniquifier, scheduled_by_record_epoch, requested_context for the continuation, or terminal_surface for the continuation.
